<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check agent's current position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(r for r, c in boundary)
        min_col = min(c for r, c in boundary)
        print(f"Agent at rows {min_row}-{min_row+4}, cols {min_col}-{min_col+4}")
        break

# Also check what changed
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    # Find agent in before and after
    for n in before_seg['nodes']:
        if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':
            before_col = min(c for r, c in n['boundary'])
            break
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':
            after_col = min(c for r, c in n['boundary'])
            break
    print(f"Agent col changed from {before_col} to {after_col}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
